---
title: "PCIG at JSM 2026"
---

The PCIG is organizing a number of events at [this year's JSM](https://ww2.amstat.org/meetings/jsm/2026/) in Boston. 

This page will be updated as more information becomes available. Please check back for updates.

## OpenDP Hackathon:

OpenDP would like to offer a free hackathon centered on the [OpenDP Library's R API](https://docs.opendp.org/en/stable/api/r/) during the week of JSM if there is sufficient interest.

Please fill out [this interest form](https://forms.gle/syTbLHtZXPmvgLGNA) by **Monday June 29th**. Marking your availability here isn't a firm commitment, but we will be using these numbers to go forward with planning.

The hackathon will be led by the library architect, Michael Shoemate, and will start with a brief introduction and tutorial, followed by working on a real problem with the library. OpenDP plans to book a space within a couple blocks of the convention center for 4 hours, and they need to get a headcount, and what time would work best. If you have any questions about the event, please contact [contact\@opendp.org](mailto:contact@opendp.org).

---

More events, and information on privacy and confidentiality related presentations, to come – stay tuned!
